visual.name: threeDModelViewer
visual.description: Interactive 3D model viewer with cross-filtering support. Load OBJ, STL, PLY, FBX, glTF, and IFC files.

dataRoles.name: modelUrlField
dataRoles.description: Column or measure containing the URL to the 3D model file

dataRoles.name: elementId
dataRoles.description: Unique identifier matching 3D model element/mesh names

dataRoles.name: category
dataRoles.description: Status or category for legend coloring (e.g., Complete, In Progress)

modelUrl.description: URL to a hosted 3D model file (OBJ, STL, PLY, FBX, glTF, IFC)

corsProxy.description: Optional proxy prefix to bypass CORS blocks (e.g. https://corsproxy.io/?)

fileFormat.description: Auto-detect or specify the 3D file format

showDiagBar.description: Show or hide the status/diagnostic bar at the bottom of the visual

titleText.description: The heading text shown above the legend items

width.description: Width of the legend panel in pixels (applies to Left/Right positions)

showCount.description: Show the number of matched elements next to each category label

showCopyButton.description: Show a button to copy all element IDs found in the model to the clipboard

cameraState.description: Persisted camera position/view — updated automatically when the user moves the camera.
